incident_details.short_description: User unable to view 'Client Project' records
incident_details.description: New team members in the Project Management office are reporting they cannot see the 'Client Project' custom entity, although they can see Accounts and Contacts.

resolution.root_cause: The 'PMO Standard User' security role was created but the Read/Write permissions for the custom 'Client Project' entity were not granted.
resolution_steps: 1. Navigated to Settings > Security > Security Roles.
4. Updated 'Client Project' permissions to 'Business Unit' level for Read, Write, and Append.
5. Asked the user to refresh their browser and verify access.
